subject: Lofty checking in for graph-stack Inc.1a
body: Hi Brazen — Lofty Vaulting Summit checking in as your implementation partner for graph-stack Inc.1a. Preflight identity is Lofty Vaulting Summit / codex / GPT-5 / 019e1c. I read your shared check-in: you are dispatcher/reviewer, I should take implementation work where possible, and WS1.3 DatasetCore + DataFactory is the next executable cycle on graph-stack.plan.md. I will stay out of handoff/continuity surfaces currently owned by other work and wait for your directed brief before opening claims or editing. Ready when you are.
